system.description: A weird agent with the supernatural ability to read and influence minds. This archetype demonstrates a power that adds to Contact (social influence) instead of Athletics, showcasing the flexibility of the weird agent system.

power.name: Mind Touch
power.description: Make skin-to-skin contact to read surface thoughts or implant a suggestion. The subject gets a Contact roll to resist; you get +1d6 from this power on your Contact roll when using it.

characteristics.text: Requires physical contact to use power
Psychic echoes of violence cause stress (optional house rule)
